title: How to download TikTok video dance challenge without watermark
tldr: Learn how to download TikTok dance challenge videos without watermarks using Saveik. Follow simple steps for iPhone, Android, or PC, and even extract MP3 audio. Save your favorite dance moves hassle-free.
description: Step-by-step guide to download TikTok dance challenge videos without watermark using Saveik. Works on iPhone, Android, and PC. Includes MP3 audio tips.
author: Saveik Team
content:
## Introduction

TikTok dance challenges have taken the world by storm, from the Renegade to the latest viral moves. Whether you want to practice choreography, share a clip with friends, or keep a memory offline, downloading these videos is essential. However, TikTok's built-in download option adds a watermark that can distract or clutter your content. That's where Saveik comes in—a free and easy tool to download TikTok dance challenge videos without watermark, preserving the original quality and your creative freedom.

## How to Download TikTok Dance Challenge Videos Without Watermark

Using Saveik is straightforward. Follow these three simple steps to save any dance challenge video from TikTok.

### Step 1: Copy the TikTok Video Link

Open the TikTok app and find the dance challenge video you want to download. Tap the "Share" icon (usually an arrow) and select "Copy Link." The link will be copied to your clipboard.

### Step 2: Visit Saveik.com

Open your browser (on any device) and go to [Saveik.com](https://saveik.com/). You'll see a clean text box waiting for your link.

### Step 3: Paste and Download

Paste the copied TikTok link into the text box on Saveik. Click the "Download" button. In seconds, you'll see options to download the video without watermark in MP4 format. Choose your preferred quality (usually HD is available) and save the file to your device.

## Device-Specific Instructions

### On iPhone

After copying the link, open Safari or any browser. Visit Saveik.com, paste the link, and download. The video will save to your Photos app. If prompted, allow access to photos.

### On Android

Use Chrome or your default browser. Follow the same steps. The downloaded video will appear in your Downloads folder or Gallery, depending on your settings.

### On PC

Use any browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge). Paste the link on Saveik.com and download. The video will save to your computer's default download location. You can then move or edit it as needed.

## Tips for Downloading MP3 Audio

Sometimes you only want the audio from a dance challenge—for a remix or personal playlist. Saveik also supports MP3 extraction. After pasting the link and hitting download, look for an "MP3" or "Audio" option. Click it to download the audio track separately. This is perfect for practicing dance moves without video distractions.

## FAQ

### Is Saveik free to use?
Yes, Saveik is completely free. There are no hidden charges or subscription fees. You can download unlimited TikTok videos without watermark.

### Will the downloaded video have any quality loss?
No, Saveik preserves the original video quality. You can download in HD if available, ensuring your dance challenge videos look crisp and clear.

### Can I use Saveik on mobile?
Absolutely. Saveik works perfectly on both iPhone and Android devices through any mobile browser. No app installation is required.

## Conclusion

Downloading TikTok dance challenge videos without watermark has never been easier. With Saveik, you can save your favorite moves in seconds, on any device, and even grab the MP3 audio. Stop struggling with watermarks and start sharing clean, professional-looking content. Visit [Saveik.com](https://saveik.com/) today and start downloading!
